languages.text: "Преступник ворвался во время смены караула, взорвал фраг-гранату и начал палить плазмой во все стороны. Мы отрезали эту сволочь от выхода, но ему удалось взять заложника. Нашему снайперу нужно время, чтобы занять позицию. Разговаривать преступник согласился только лично с вами, возможно, вы задержите его на несколько минут?" {n}Взгляд Иокасты на секунду соскальзывает на пол, на окровавленное тело под ногами блюстителей.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Преступник ворвался во время смены караула, взорвал фраг-гранату и начал палить плазмой во все стороны. Мы отрезали эту сволочь от выхода, но ему удалость взять заложника. Нашему снайперу нужно время, чтобы занять позицию. Разговаривать преступник согласился только лично с вами, возмоэно, вы задержите его на несколько минут?" {n}Взгляд Иокасты на секунду соскальзывает на пол, на окровавленное тело у операционной.{/n}

languages.text: "The perpetrator broke in during the guard change, detonated a frag grenade, and started spraying plasma in every direction. We blocked his escape route, but the scum managed to take a hostage. Our sniper needs time to get into position. The perpetrator is only willing to talk to you — perhaps you can stall him for a few minutes?" {n}Sauerback's gaze momentarily shifts to the floor, to the bloodied body lying at the enforcers' feet.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Преступник ворвался во время смены караула, взорвал фраг-гранату и начал палить плазмой во все стороны. Мы отрезали эту сволочь от выхода, но ему удалось взять заложника. Нашему снайперу нужно время, чтобы занять позицию. Разговаривать преступник согласился только лично с вами, возможно, вы задержите его на несколько минут?" {n}Взгляд Иокасты на секунду соскальзывает на пол, на окровавленное тело под ногами блюстителей.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "The perpetrator broke in during the guard change, detonated a frag grenade, and started spraying plasma in every direction. We blocked his escape route, but the scum managed to take a hostage. Our sniper needs time to get into position. The perpetrator is only willing to talk to you — perhaps you can stall him for a few minutes?" {n}Sauerback's gaze momentarily shifts to the floor, to the bloodied body lying at the enforcers' feet.{/n}

languages.text: "Fail; nöbet değişimi sırasında içeri girmiş, parça tesirli bomba patlatmış ve her yana plazma yağdırmaya başlamış. Kaçış yolunu kapattık ama şerefsiz, birini rehine almayı başardı. Keskin nişancımızın mevzilenmesi zaman alacak. Fail sadece sizinle konuşmak istiyor. Belki onu birkaç dakika oyalayabilirsiniz." {n}Sauerback'in bakışları bir anlığına yere, infazcıların ayaklarının dibinde yatan kanlı cesede kayıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The perpetrator broke in during the guard change, detonated a frag grenade, and started spraying plasma in every direction. We blocked his escape route, but the scum managed to take a hostage. Our sniper needs time to get into position. The perpetrator is only willing to talk to you — perhaps you can stall him for a few minutes?" {n}Sauerback's gaze momentarily shifts to the floor, to the bloodied body lying at the enforcers' feet.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Fail; nöbet değişimi sırasında içeri girmiş, parça tesirli bomba patlatmış ve her yana plazma yağdırmaya başlamış. Kaçış yolunu kapattık ama şerefsiz, birini rehine almayı başardı. Keskin nişancımızın mevzilenmesi zaman alacak. Fail sadece sizinle konuşmak istiyor. Belki onu birkaç dakika oyalayabilirsiniz." {n}Sauerback'in bakışları bir anlığına yere, infazcıların ayaklarının dibinde yatan kanlı cesede kayıyor.{/n}

languages.text: “行凶者趁换岗间隙闯入，引爆了一枚破片手雷，并向四周扫射等离子体。我们封锁了他的退路，但这人渣劫持了一名人质。狙击手就位还需要时间。行凶者只肯和您谈——或许您能拖住他几分钟？”{n}苏尔贝克的目光短暂移向地面，落在执法者脚下那具血淋淋的尸体上。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The perpetrator broke in during the guard change, detonated a frag grenade, and started spraying plasma in every direction. We blocked his escape route, but the scum managed to take a hostage. Our sniper needs time to get into position. The perpetrator is only willing to talk to you — perhaps you can stall him for a few minutes?" {n}Sauerback's gaze momentarily shifts to the floor, to the bloodied body lying at the enforcers' feet.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “行凶者趁换岗间隙闯入，引爆了一枚破片手雷，并向四周扫射等离子体。我们封锁了他的退路，但这人渣劫持了一名人质。狙击手就位还需要时间。行凶者只肯和您谈——或许您能拖住他几分钟？”{n}苏尔贝克的目光短暂移向地面，落在执法者脚下那具血淋淋的尸体上。{/n}

languages.text: "Der Täter ist während des Wachwechsels durchgebrochen, hat eine Splittergranate gezündet und Plasma in alle Richtungen versprüht. Wir haben ihm den Fluchtweg abgeschnitten, aber der Mistkerl hat eine Geisel. Unser Scharfschütze braucht etwas Zeit, um in Position zu gehen. Der Täter will nur mit Euch reden ... vielleicht könnt Ihr ihn ja ein paar Minuten beschäftigen?" {n}Sauerback wirft einen kurzen Blick auf den blutigen Körper, der vor den Enforcern auf dem Boden liegt.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The perpetrator broke in during the guard change, detonated a frag grenade, and started spraying plasma in every direction. We blocked his escape route, but the scum managed to take a hostage. Our sniper needs time to get into position. The perpetrator is only willing to talk to you — perhaps you can stall him for a few minutes?" {n}Sauerback's gaze momentarily shifts to the floor, to the bloodied body lying at the enforcers' feet.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Der Täter ist während des Wachwechsels durchgebrochen, hat eine Splittergranate gezündet und Plasma in alle Richtungen versprüht. Wir haben ihm den Fluchtweg abgeschnitten, aber der Mistkerl hat eine Geisel. Unser Scharfschütze braucht etwas Zeit, um in Position zu gehen. Der Täter will nur mit Euch reden ... vielleicht könnt Ihr ihn ja ein paar Minuten beschäftigen?" {n}Sauerback wirft einen kurzen Blick auf den blutigen Körper, der vor den Enforcern auf dem Boden liegt.{/n}

languages.text: «El criminal se coló durante el cambio de guardia, detonó una granada frag y empezó a rociar a todo el mundo con plasma. Bloqueamos su ruta de escape, pero el miserable ha conseguido hacerse con un rehén. Solo está dispuesto a hablar con usted, y el francotirador necesita tiempo para colocarse en posición. ¿Podría distraerlo durante unos minutos?». {n}La mirada de Sauerback pasa momentáneamente al cuerpo ensangrentado que hay a los pies de los guardias.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The perpetrator broke in during the guard change, detonated a frag grenade, and started spraying plasma in every direction. We blocked his escape route, but the scum managed to take a hostage. Our sniper needs time to get into position. The perpetrator is only willing to talk to you — perhaps you can stall him for a few minutes?" {n}Sauerback's gaze momentarily shifts to the floor, to the bloodied body lying at the enforcers' feet.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «El criminal se coló durante el cambio de guardia, detonó una granada frag y empezó a rociar a todo el mundo con plasma. Bloqueamos su ruta de escape, pero el miserable ha conseguido hacerse con un rehén. Solo está dispuesto a hablar con usted, y el francotirador necesita tiempo para colocarse en posición. ¿Podría distraerlo durante unos minutos?». {n}La mirada de Sauerback pasa momentáneamente al cuerpo ensangrentado que hay a los pies de los guardias.{/n}

languages.text: « L'assaillant s'est introduit dans l'infirmerie pendant la relève de la garde et a lancé une grenade à fragmentation avant de déchaîner des torrents de plasma dans toutes les directions. Nous l'avons empêché de prendre la fuite, mais cette ordure a réussi à prendre un otage. Notre sniper a besoin de temps pour se mettre en position. L’assaillant a déclaré qu'il n'accepterait de négocier qu'avec vous, peut-être pourriez-vous accaparer son attention pendant quelques instants ? » {n}Le regard de Sauerback se tourne brièvement vers le sol et le corps ensanglanté qui gît aux pieds des prévôts.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The perpetrator broke in during the guard change, detonated a frag grenade, and started spraying plasma in every direction. We blocked his escape route, but the scum managed to take a hostage. Our sniper needs time to get into position. The perpetrator is only willing to talk to you — perhaps you can stall him for a few minutes?" {n}Sauerback's gaze momentarily shifts to the floor, to the bloodied body lying at the enforcers' feet.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « L'assaillant s'est introduit dans l'infirmerie pendant la relève de la garde et a lancé une grenade à fragmentation avant de déchaîner des torrents de plasma dans toutes les directions. Nous l'avons empêché de prendre la fuite, mais cette ordure a réussi à prendre un otage. Notre sniper a besoin de temps pour se mettre en position. L’assaillant a déclaré qu'il n'accepterait de négocier qu'avec vous, peut-être pourriez-vous accaparer son attention pendant quelques instants ? » {n}Le regard de Sauerback se tourne brièvement vers le sol et le corps ensanglanté qui gît aux pieds des prévôts.{/n}

languages.text: 「犯人は警備員の交代時間に侵入し、破片手榴弾を爆発させ、四方八方にプラズマをまき散らし始めた。逃走経路は塞いだが、人質を取られた。スナイパーが位置に着くまで時間が必要だ。犯人はあなたとしか話したがらない。あなたなら数分間、彼を足止めできるのでは？」{n}ザウアバックの視線が一瞬、床に移り、執行官の足元に横たわる血まみれの死体に注がれる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The perpetrator broke in during the guard change, detonated a frag grenade, and started spraying plasma in every direction. We blocked his escape route, but the scum managed to take a hostage. Our sniper needs time to get into position. The perpetrator is only willing to talk to you — perhaps you can stall him for a few minutes?" {n}Sauerback's gaze momentarily shifts to the floor, to the bloodied body lying at the enforcers' feet.{/n}
